name: Fate of Ophelia — Taylor Swift
notes: Strings + vocals. Piano stem near-silent (correct). Vocals excellent.

name: Piano Man — Billy Joel
notes: Dense live mix. Piano stem noisy (harmonica bleed). Vocals stellar.

name: Earth Flyover — Crystal Method
notes: Electronic. Testing how Demucs handles synth-heavy material.

name: Dirty Water — Trombone Shorty
notes: Funk/brass. Horns expected in other. Tight rhythm section — good bass/drums test.

name: Thunderstruck — AC/DC
notes: Hard rock. Angus's guitar is distinctive — good guitar stem test. Dense low end.

name: So Alive — Love and Rockets
notes: Post-punk/goth. Heavily effected guitar — will it land in guitar or other?

name: Paralyzed — Finger Eleven
notes: Alt rock. Good all-round separation test — balanced mix of guitar, bass, drums, vocals.

name: Enter Sandman — Metallica
notes: Heavy metal. Stress test for drums — fast double-kick, heavy distorted guitar.

name: Not Like Us — Kendrick Lamar
notes: Hip-hop. Programmed drums, heavy bass, strong vocal. A minor sample flip intro.

name: Lose Control — Teddy Swims
notes: Soul/R&B. Massive vocal, lush production. Good test for vocal isolation quality.

name: Stick Season — Noah Kahan
notes: Folk/indie. Acoustic guitar + vocals — good pitch extraction test.
